summary: Backend testing for file authentication with JWT token query parameter completed successfully. All 13 tests passed. Verified: (1) Login API returns access_token, (2) GET /api/uploads/{filename}?token={jwt} returns 200 with valid token, (3) GET /api/uploads/{filename} without token returns 401, (4) File upload via POST /api/uploads/cbct-temp works with auth header, (5) Uploaded file accessible via GET /api/uploads/{filename}?token={jwt}, (6) GET /api/procedures/{id} returns procedure with cbct_files, phase2_data.iopa_files, phase3_data.iopa_files fields.
critical_code_review_comments: serve_upload endpoint correctly accepts both Authorization header and ?token= query param - good implementation for React Native compatibility
Token validation in serve_upload uses jwt.decode with proper algorithm specification
File access control properly checks user role and procedure ownership before serving files

seed_data_creation: None - used existing procedures and uploaded test files
context_for_next_testing_agent: File authentication with JWT token query parameter is working correctly. The serve_upload endpoint at /api/uploads/{filename} accepts ?token={jwt} query param for React Native Image component compatibility. Tests verified: login returns access_token, file upload with auth header works, file serve with token query param returns 200, file serve without token returns 401, invalid token returns 401.
